projects.title: Task Manager Library
projects.description: Develop a core logic library for a task management system, focusing on strictly typed task objects, status enums, and collection filtering.

projects.title: Interactive Data Fetcher
projects.description: Create a type-safe API wrapper using generics and interfaces to fetch, validate, and transform remote data with robust error handling.

projects.title: Plugin System Core
projects.description: Architect a generic plugin loader that allows third-party modules to extend application functionality while maintaining strict type safety.
